items.description: slugify function accepts a single parameter 'text' of type str
items.expected_behavior: Calling slugify with a non-str argument raises TypeError

items.description: slugify function returns a string representing a lowercase URL-safe slug
items.expected_behavior: slugify returns a str output for valid str input

items.description: All alphabetic characters in input text are converted to lowercase in output slug
items.expected_behavior: Output slug contains only lowercase alphabetic characters

items.description: Leading and trailing whitespace in input text is ignored in output slug
items.expected_behavior: Output slug does not start or end with hyphens caused by whitespace

items.description: One or more whitespace characters in input text are replaced with a single hyphen in output slug
items.expected_behavior: Consecutive whitespace sequences in input produce single hyphen in output

items.description: All punctuation characters are removed from input text in output slug
items.expected_behavior: Output slug contains no punctuation characters except hyphens

items.description: Existing hyphens in input text are preserved in output slug
items.expected_behavior: Hyphens present in input appear in output at corresponding positions

items.description: Multiple adjacent hyphens in output slug collapse to a single hyphen
items.expected_behavior: Output slug never contains consecutive hyphens

items.description: Empty string input returns empty string output
Input string containing only whitespace returns empty string output
Input string containing only punctuation returns empty string output
Input string already slugified returns the same string
slugify raises TypeError if input parameter 'text' is not a string

items.expected_behavior: slugify processes ASCII input correctly; non-ASCII input behavior is undefined

items.description: slugify has no side effects such as reading/writing files, network requests, or executing external commands
items.expected_behavior: slugify does not perform any I/O or external operations

items.description: slugify runs in O(N) time and uses O(N) space, where N is input string length
items.expected_behavior: slugify performance scales linearly with input length
